message:
fix(table): add rounding correction loop to collapse_widths()

Per RICH_SPEC Section 9.3 (lines 1680-1694), after proportional shrinking
there should be a post-loop correction that removes any remaining excess
from columns in reverse order.

Also validates and closes:
- rich_rust-t54: expand_widths ratio distribution (already working)
- rich_rust-gk4: collapse_widths rounding correction (fixed)
- rich_rust-qgs: markup parser validation (passes all tests)
- rich_rust-26r: expand_widths verification (validated)
- rich_rust-ms5: collapse_widths verification (validated)
- rich_rust-10p: Text.divide() verification (validated)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
